# relieffromstay.org

> Guide to motions for relief from the automatic stay in bankruptcy.

relieffromstay.org is a free, open-source educational resource about relief from stay motions under 11 U.S.C. Section 362(d). Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://relieffromstay.org/: Guide to relief from stay -- when creditors ask to lift bankruptcy protection

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
